entities.name: Architectural Principles
entities.context: Framework guiding design and implementation decisions, stored as indexed knowledge files

entities.name: Core Principles
entities.context: Fundamental principles within the architectural framework (core.md)

entities.name: Safety Principles
entities.context: Safety-focused principles within the architectural framework (safety.md)

entities.name: Quality Principles
entities.context: Quality-focused principles within the architectural framework (quality.md)

entities.name: Design Principles
entities.context: Design review principles, loaded when relevant to task (design.md)

entities.name: Operations Principles
entities.context: Operations and deployment principles, loaded when relevant (operations.md)

entities.name: Phase 0
entities.context: Mandatory first phase in workflow requiring architectural principle loading before any design or implementation

relationships.context: Phase 0 mandates loading architectural principles before any work begins
Core principles are a mandatory component of the architectural framework
Safety principles are a mandatory component of the architectural framework
Quality principles are a mandatory component of the architectural framework
Design principles are an optional component for design reviews
Operations principles are an optional component for ops/deployment tasks
